overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in a black coat and hat walking through a historic New Orleans-inspired city at night. The character navigates wet cobblestone streets, enters a narrow alleyway with tropical plants, emerges into a courtyard with a church, and continues through the atmospheric gas-lit streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with iron balconies and tram tracks

events.description: beginning of clip, walking along wet cobblestone street in historic district

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street past brick buildings with iron balconies, approaching an iron gate

notable_agents.action: man leaning against the wall smoking near the building entrance

entered.detail: multi-story brick building with tall windows on the left side of the street
red brick building with white trim and arched windows
decorative iron railings on the building balconies
cast iron gas lamp post illuminating the street
metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street
wooden crates and barriers stacked on the sidewalk
colorful poster affixed to the brick wall advertising a show

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet cobblestone street lined with historic brick buildings featuring iron balconies. Gas lamps cast a warm glow on the scene. A man leans against the wall on the right as the character approaches an iron gate leading to an alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between buildings with tropical plants

events.description: opening the iron gate and entering the narrow alleyway

agents.ego_description: opening the iron gate and walking through the narrow passage with walls on both sides

entered.detail: black iron gate that the character opens to enter the alley
weathered brick and plaster walls forming a narrow corridor
large red-leafed tropical plants growing along the walls
small lantern mounted on the wall providing dim light

segments.scene_description: The character opens an iron gate and enters a narrow, enclosed alleyway. The passage is lined with weathered walls and features vibrant red tropical plants. Wall-mounted lanterns provide dim illumination as the character walks toward a wooden door at the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with church and book shop

events.description: exiting the narrow alley into an open courtyard with a church visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard past the book keepers shop, observing the church and surroundings

notable_agents.action: two men conversing near a street lamp post

entered.detail: tall gothic stone church tower with pointed architecture
two-story building with sign reading Jackson & Thibodeaux Book Keepers
ornate cast iron street lamp illuminating the courtyard
wooden wagon or cart parked near the building

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the alley into an open courtyard featuring a prominent stone church tower in the background. The Jackson & Thibodeaux Book Keepers building stands on the left. Two men converse near a street lamp on the right as the character walks past a wooden cart and continues through the plaza.

events.description: leaving the courtyard and returning to the main cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the wet cobblestone street past various shops and historic buildings

entered.detail: row of commercial buildings with shuttered windows and signs on the left
row of shops with arched doorways and hanging signs on the right
wooden signs hanging from iron brackets advertising businesses
wooden barrels and crates stacked on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the main cobblestone street and continues walking through the historic district. The street is lined with various storefronts featuring hanging signs and shuttered windows. Wooden barrels and crates line the sidewalks as gas lamps illuminate the wet pavement ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gas-lit historic district that transitions from open cobblestone streets into a secluded alleyway before emerging into a church courtyard. It begins by following a character along a wet street lined with brick buildings and iron balconies, passing a man leaning against a wall before the camera moves through an iron gate. As the character enters a narrow, enclosed alleyway, the environment shifts to weathered walls and vibrant red tropical plants illuminated by dim lanterns. The scene then opens into a wide courtyard featuring a prominent stone church tower and the Jackson & Thibodeaux Book Keepers building, where the character walks past a wooden cart and conversing men. Finally, the camera follows the character back onto the main cobblestone street, moving past shuttered storefronts and wooden barrels under the warm glow of gas lamps.
